# Dragon Tattoos - Studio Management System
> A premium, full-stack management portal designed for high-end tattoo studios.

## Core Files
- [app.py](file:///e:/TatooStudioProject/app.py): Main Flask application entry point, route definitions, and unified business logic.
- [db.py](file:///e:/TatooStudioProject/db.py): Database connection abstraction for MySQL.
- [requirements.txt](file:///e:/TatooStudioProject/requirements.txt): Python dependencies including Flask and mysql-connector.
- [docs/](file:///e:/TatooStudioProject/docs/): Architectural diagrams, plans, and API documentation.
- [templates/](file:///e:/TatooStudioProject/templates/): Jinja2 HTML templates for the UI routing.
- [static/](file:///e:/TatooStudioProject/static/): Static assets including custom Vanilla CSS under `static/css`.

## Key Concepts
- **Role-based Access**: Differentiates between Owner, Artist, and Customer portals (`customer_dashboard`, `owner_dashboard`, etc.).
- **Vanilla Aesthetics**: Framework-free CSS architecture optimized for a luxury feel without React/Tailwind bloat.
- **Studio Operations**: Integrates appointment scheduling, gallery management, and billing natively inside standard routes.
